checks.description: Title must not imply experiment or CT validation.
checks.evidence: \texorpdfstring{Separating breakthrough from pore-network clogging indicators in gas-driven fine-debris transport through \LiSi pebble beds}{Separating breakthrough from pore-network clogging indicators in gas-driven fine-debris transport through Li4SiO4 pebble beds}

checks.description: Abstract must not claim pressure-calibrated Ib or safety limits.
checks.evidence: Fine debris in gas-purged ceramic breeder beds can contaminate downstream regions before a bed develops resolved hydraulic degradation, yet outlet breakthrough is often interpreted as part of a single clogging sequence. This can overstate hydraulic risk when a mobile debris tail reaches connected pathways without observed loss of purge access. Here we examine conditional transport--filtering sepa

checks.description: OpenFOAM pressure claims must be absent until the manuscript-insertion gate is true.
The manuscript must retain DEM-derived pore reconstruction wording and reject experimental CT interpretation.
Hydraulic checks must be bounded as proxies or cropped-domain screening and not used to calibrate Ib.
The paper must remain bounded to pre-clogging rather than universal critical transition.
Claim-evidence ledger must have no missing-evidence claims.
Benchmark ledger must have no missing-evidence benchmarks.

evidence_boundary: overclaim guard only; it does not create new scientific evidence.
